_comment: Canonical token addresses per chain. The skill MUST resolve user-provided symbols to these checksummed addresses BEFORE calling any external API. After receiving a LI.FI / DODO quote, the skill MUST verify the returned token addresses match the expected ones — if not, ABORT (possible scam token mapping).
_security_rule: Never trust symbol resolution by a third-party API. Always pass addresses. Always verify the response uses the same addresses you sent.
_audit_sources: on-chain symbol() + decimals() probe via eth_call
Circle FiatTokenProxy masterMinter() pattern for USDC

USDC._source: Circle official deployments (FiatTokenProxy with masterMinter), all verified via CoinGecko canonical platforms + on-chain symbol probe.

USDT._source: Tether canonical addresses per CoinGecko 'tether' platforms. Note: Polygon, Arbitrum, and (one variant of) Optimism that older docs labeled 'USDT' are actually USDT0 — see USDT0 entry. Real Tether canonically only on Ethereum and Avalanche.
USDT._note_optimism: Optimism 0x94b008aA... reports symbol='USDT' on-chain but is bridged-USDT (not in CoinGecko's tether platforms map). USDT0 on Optimism is a separate contract — see USDT0 entry.
USDT._note_polygon_arbitrum: Earlier docs registered 0xc2132D05... (Polygon) and 0xFd086bC7... (Arbitrum) as USDT — those addresses on-chain now report symbol='USDT0' (LayerZero OFT). Use USDT0 entry for those.

USDT0._source: LayerZero OFT USDT0 — addresses from CoinGecko 'usdt0' canonical platforms map (verified 2026-06-16). On-chain symbol() returns 'USD₮0' (with Tether's ₮ Unicode character, U+20AE) — verification scripts must accept both 'USDT0' and 'USD₮0'.
USDT0._note: Underscore-prefixed entries are reference addresses for chains not in our networks.json. Resolve them dynamically via LI.FI /tokens?chains=<chainId> when needed.

USD0._source: Usual Protocol USD0 stablecoin, verified via CoinGecko.

WETH._source: Canonical wrapped ETH per chain, verified via CoinGecko + on-chain symbol probe.
WETH._note_pharos: LI.FI registry + on-chain symbol() = 'WETH', name = 'Wrapped Ether'. Legacy WETH at 0x7d211F77... is unused.
WETH._note_avalanche: Avalanche has no native WETH — the 0x49D5c2Bd... contract reports symbol='WETH.e' (bridged). See WETH.e entry.

WETH.e._source: Bridged WETH on Avalanche — on-chain symbol() = 'WETH.e'. CoinGecko maps it under WETH platforms but the on-chain identity is WETH.e.

WPROS._source: LI.FI registry + on-chain symbol() = 'WPROS', name = 'Wrapped PROS'.

LINK._source: Chainlink LINK token, verified via CoinGecko + on-chain.

USDC.e._source: Bridged USDC.e — on-chain symbol is literally 'USDC.e' (with dot). Pharos has the LI.FI-bridged variant.

HYPE._source: HyperEVM native token. Look up address via LI.FI /tokens at runtime if needed.
